seoTitle: How to Make a Circle Outline in Canva Easily
metaDescription: Create a clean circle outline in Canva and customize its color and style for logos, social graphics, and marketing designs.
intro: A simple circle outline can frame a photo, highlight text, or anchor a logo, and Canva makes it quick to create one without needing outside design software. This guide covers accessing the shape tools, building the outline, and customizing it to match your project. It's suited for marketers, social media managers, and anyone building brand graphics.

steps.heading: Access Canva's shape tools
steps.body: Open the elements panel and find the circle shape to start building your outline.

steps.heading: Create the outline
steps.body: Adjust the shape's fill and border settings so only the outline remains visible.

steps.heading: Customize colors and stroke
steps.body: Match the outline's color and thickness to your brand or design style.

steps.heading: Apply it to your design
steps.body: Use the circle outline to frame images, highlight text, or add visual structure to your layout.

faq.question: Can I change the thickness of a circle outline in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, the border or stroke width can typically be adjusted to make the outline thicker or thinner.

faq.question: Is this feature available on Canva's free plan?
faq.answer: Basic shape tools including circles and outlines are generally available without a paid subscription.

faq.question: Can I combine a circle outline with photos?
faq.answer: Yes — placing an outline around or over a photo is a common way to add visual framing to social graphics.
